narrative.summary: Wine bar + small plates that runs late; 4.5 rating, neighborhood anchor vibes.

blocks.title: The Vibe
blocks.body:
⭐⭐⭐⭐ "I should start this by saying nothing seemingly “negative” in this review would stop me from coming here again as it’s truly a great spot. Overall it was good! I was here about 2 years ago and it was better with peace and love. The food was a solid 7.5- 8/10 but the timing wasn’t. Pizza came first and then everything came out right after all at once so a lot of it got cold by the time we got to it. The rigatoni was wonderful and so was the bread, pizza and arancini. Just wish i could eat it as it came out the kitchen. Hugo spritz was delish and service was wonderful.  I unfortunately don’t remember his name but he was covered in tattoos and very kind! Ambiance was great and they even gave us free aperitif shots out of nowhere which perioddddd thank youuu. I think our server accidentally punched in calamari so we also got that for free which perioddd thank you (x2). Overall a great date night or girls night spot!"

⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Good ambiance and food. If you want the place to be less crowded then come before 8. After that bar poet becomes quite literally the place for pre, and it's amazing. We were 4 people, ordered a bunch of food. The calamari, the braised beef pasta, and another pasta. The type of food served is pretty decent. most definitely is worth the money. You might need a reservation on the weekends, but otherwise the place is always welcoming and the wait is not that long."

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Overall, a cool pub style restaurant - food was surprisingly really good, especially for what it is!

Parmesan Chicken Sandwich - 4.2/5 - I loved it and would definitely get it again. Perfect sandwich and flavours!

The fries were really nice too

Ambiance - 3.8/5 - it was a nice venue, but it was hard to chat with friends because it was a bit too loud .. especially since we were there during dinner time and not that late

Thanks for the great service too!"
